facebook-scrape.summary: Scraped Facebook (4:07 AM ET Apr 1). No new activity since prior run (07:10 UTC). Notifications: same 2 unreads as last run — 'Window Cleaning Business Owners has a new post' (now 4h, someone else's post) and 'Homeowners looking for Contractors and Remodelers' description change (23h). Zero new comment notifications on Vito's Novaro AI posts. Photo tag notifications (Usman Aulakh/Junk Removal Owners 9h, Crystal Mc/Cleaners Connect 13h, Eric Tower/Power Washing 16h) are welcome/welcome-to-group auto-tags predating last run. Messenger: Ann Giroux sole unread thread — same DM already counted. Activity log: most recent Vito action still Mar 31 at 6:17 PM (admin welcome mention in Junk Removal Owners), nothing new Apr 1. Cumulative totals unchanged: 18 groups, 18 posts live, 116 comments, 39 positive, 4 DMs, 13 interest signals. Daily Apr 1 entry unchanged: {groups:18, posts:0, comments:3, positive:1, dms:1, interest:1}.

linkedin-scrape.summary: Scraped LinkedIn (3:37 AM ET Apr 1): No changes since last run (06:38 UTC). 1,040 connections, 181 pending sent requests — most recent batch sent ~19 hours ago (Jim Black, David Sconza, Justin Walsh, Patrick Winterstein, Aidan Westphalen, Gavin Bilby, Karter Howard, Eli Nash, Jackson Manning, Rex Owen). Cumulative requestsAccepted still 3 (no new acceptances). Messaging inbox now shows 10 unread (up from 9) — new thread is Stefano Cardillo (outbound message sent Mar 31, no reply yet). No new inbound prospect replies. Active outbound threads with no responses: Colin Crump, Tyler Grodsky, David Kozak, Jason Stahlberg, William DeMichele, Michael Rose, Rich Iandoli. Only inbound: Vincent Handugan VA counter-pitch (Mar 20, not a buying signal). No new interest signals.
